display.purpose: Hero statements and one-line claims only.

headline.purpose: Section heads, diagram titles, and major status labels.

body.purpose: Main narrative copy with long-form readability.

label.purpose: Metadata, pills, and compact interface labels.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Hover lift for pills, chips, and compact controls.

shadows.name: ambient-mid
shadows.purpose: Large prompt shells and hero modules.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover and focus transitions.

themeDetection.usage: Every doc page must include a @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) block after </style> that overrides all :root CSS custom properties with light-theme equivalents. The :root block must also set color-scheme: dark light.
themeDetection.notes: No manual toggle. No JS. The browser automatically picks the right theme based on the OS/system preference.

technicalSurface.usage: Use for code, formulas, contingency tables, and other dense technical specimens. Never hard-code a dark technical surface outside a theme token.

navigation.usage: Contents navigation is navigational text, not a de-emphasized annotation. It must use the dedicated sidebar tones in light mode.

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Primary quiet action for nav and section CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: #111111; color: #F5F7FA; border: 1px solid #2A2A2A; border-radius: 999px; padding: 12px 20px; font: 500 14px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.12), 0 0 0 4px rgba(127,178,255,0.22); }

components.name: Quiet Chip
components.description: Compact label for status and metadata.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #171717; color: #F5F7FA; border: 1px solid #2A2A2A; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 14px; font: 500 13px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Floating Panel
components.description: Default container for diagrams, summaries, and grouped evidence.
components.html:
Dataset snapshot

Use this panel for evidence, never for decoration.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #111111; color: #F5F7FA; border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.34); max-width: 420px; } .ds-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 12px; font: 500 20px/1.1 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: #8C919A; font: 400 16px/1.72 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; }

components.name: Prompt Shell
components.description: Signature hero interaction, long and tactile but still quiet.
components.html: Ask what the project already proves.
components.css: .ds-prompt { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; min-width: 320px; max-width: 560px; background: #171717; color: #8C919A; border: 1px solid #2A2A2A; border-radius: 999px; padding: 20px 24px; box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.34); } .ds-prompt-copy { font: 400 16px/1.4 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-prompt-send { width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #F5F7FA; font: 500 20px/1 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1); } .ds-prompt-send:hover { border-color: rgba(127,178,255,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(127,178,255,0.18); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-prompt-send:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.12), 0 0 0 4px rgba(127,178,255,0.22); }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Low-noise top navigation for dark brand surfaces.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; padding: 10px 0; } .ds-nav a { color: #8C919A; text-decoration: none; font: 500 14px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1); } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a:focus-visible { color: #F5F7FA; outline: none; }

narrative.northStar: Orbital Clinical Briefing (dark) / Clean Clinical Document (light)
narrative.overview:
This system supports two themes: dark (default, 'projected onto a black field') and light (adapted to a clean off-white field for print-like reading). Both follow the same design principles: calm, exact, and slightly futuristic. The dark mood is controlled atmosphere projected onto black. The light mood is a clean clinical document on an off-white field with dark ink. Both themes share the same sparse composition, premium restraint, and one-halo accent rule.

The design language is sparse and premium. Large type carries the narrative. Surfaces are few and quiet. Accent color appears as a faint halo, not a rainbow. Density stays low so the distinction between current evidence and future roadmap remains easy to parse.

This system explicitly rejects the anti-references in `PRODUCT.md`: salesy SaaS landing page, busy dashboard, playful consumer AI site, flashy gradients, infographic clutter, over-carded layouts, and loud promotional copy.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-led palette with one cold halo accent (dark); clean white-led palette (light)
Sans-serif typography with surgical spacing and tight hierarchy
Sparse composition, long breathing room, few containers

rules.name: The One Halo Rule (both themes)
rules.body: The accent blue is never a second background. It is a signal accent on 10% or less of any screen. Dark: `#7FB2FF`. Light: `#4A7FCF`.

rules.name: The Silent Hero Rule
rules.body: Hero typography carries scale and spacing, not effects. No serif swaps, no gradient text, no over-tight tracking below `-0.04em`.

rules.name: The Atmosphere, Not Glass Rule
rules.body: Use tonal layering and ambient shadow. Decorative glassmorphism is forbidden.

rules.name: Automatic Theme Detection
rules.body: Every doc page must include a `@media (prefers-color-scheme: light)` block overriding `:root` CSS custom properties with light-theme equivalents. The `:root` block must also set `color-scheme: dark light`. No JS, no manual toggle -- purely automatic via OS/browser preference.

dos: Do keep the page field in the `#030303` to `#111111` range (dark) or `#F7F8FA` to `#FFFFFF` range (light) and let whitespace do the work.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast in both themes: high-ink on surface for primary copy.
Do reserve the halo blue for one focal interaction per viewport.
Do keep long-form explanatory copy within 65-72ch and sentence case.
Do separate implemented evidence from roadmap with hierarchy, pacing, and grouping before adding any extra color.
Do include the automatic theme detection block in every doc page.
donts: Don't make this feel like a salesy SaaS landing page.
Don't make this feel like a busy dashboard.
Don't make this feel like a playful consumer AI site.
Don't use flashy gradients, infographic clutter, over-carded layouts, or loud promotional copy.
Don't use serif hero type, repeating grid overlays, rainbow cohort color systems, or metric-card walls as the page's main grammar.
Don't pair a visible border with a giant decorative shadow or blur-heavy glass treatment.
Don't forget to include the theme-detection @media block when creating a new doc page.
